notes: Acquired by Sun Microsystems August 1999 for ~$540M stock deal. Products rebranded as Sun Forte. Oracle acquired Sun in 2010.

successor: Aberdeen (Harte-Hanks); now part of Informa Tech
notes: Aberdeen Group acquired by Harte-Hanks in 2001; brand continued under various owners.
Partner providing Enterprise Access Server (EAS) for Forte legacy integration.
Acquired Forte Software in 1999. Sun itself acquired by Oracle in January 2010.
Key Forte distribution partner. Acquired by Compaq in 1998; Compaq merged with HP in 2002.
